project.name: Cantabile JavaScript API
project.description: JavaScript API for interfacing with Cantabile Network API

Application.name: Application
Application.description:
Interface to the application object

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/application:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

BindingParam.name: BindingParam
BindingParam.description: An anonymous type that describes a binding point parameter

BindingPointEntry4.name: BindingPointEntry4
BindingPointEntry4.description: An anonymous type that describes a binding point entry as returned from {{#crossLink "Bindings4/availableBindingPoints:method"}}{{/crosslink}}

BindingPointInfo.name: BindingPointInfo
BindingPointInfo.description: An anonymous type that describes a binding point

BindingPointInfo4.name: BindingPointInfo4
BindingPointInfo4.description: An anonymous type that describes a binding point

BindingWatcher.name: BindingWatcher
BindingWatcher.description:
Represents an active connection watching a source binding point for changes/invocations

Returned from the {{#crossLink "Bindings/watch:method"}}{{/crossLink}} method.

Bindings.name: Bindings
Bindings.description:
Provides access to Cantabile's binding points.

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/bindings:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

Binding4Watcher.name: Binding4Watcher
Binding4Watcher.description:
Represents an active connection watching a source binding point for changes/invocations

Returned from the {{#crossLink "Bindings/watch:method"}}{{/crossLink}} method.

Bindings4.name: Bindings4
Bindings4.description:
Provides access to Cantabile's binding points.

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/bindings4:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

params.name: host
params.description:
The host to connect to. This can be either <baseaddress> or http://<baseaddress> or ws://<baseaddress>
When running in a browser, the defaults to `${window.location.host}`.  In other environments it defaults to 
`localhost:35007`.

ColorEntry.name: ColorEntry
ColorEntry.description: An anonymous type representing a color table entry

CommandInfo.name: CommandInfo
CommandInfo.description: An anonymous type that describes a command

Commands.name: Commands
Commands.description:
Provides access to Cantabile's UI commands

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/commands:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

EndPoint.name: EndPoint
EndPoint.description: Common functionality for all end point handlers

Engine.name: Engine
Engine.description:
Provides access to Cantabile's engine object for start/stop control

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/engine:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

KeyRange.name: KeyRange
KeyRange.description: An anonymous type representing an active key range

KeyRanges.name: KeyRanges
KeyRanges.description:
Provides access to information about the currently active set of key ranges

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/keyRanges:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

MidiControllerEvent.name: MidiControllerEvent
MidiControllerEvent.description:
An anonymous type representing a complex MIDI controller event.  

MidiController events can be passed to anywhere that expects MIDI Data (eg: a target MIDI binding point), or can be 
used as a condition on a MIDI source binding point.

ControllerWatcher.name: ControllerWatcher
ControllerWatcher.description:
Represents a monitored controller

Returned from the {{#crossLink "OnscreenKeyboard/watch:method"}}{{/crossLink}} method.

OnscreenKeyboard.name: OnscreenKeyboard
OnscreenKeyboard.description:
Provides access to controllers managed by Cantabile's on-screen keyboard device

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/onscreenKeyboard:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

SetList.name: SetList
SetList.description:
Used to access and control Cantabile's set list functionality.

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/setList:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

SetListItem.name: SetListItem
SetListItem.description: An anonymous type representing a item (either a song or break) in a set list

ShowNote.name: ShowNote
ShowNote.description: An anonymous type representing a show note

ShowNotes.name: ShowNotes
ShowNotes.description:
Used to access the current set of show notes

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/showNotes:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

Song.name: Song
Song.description:
Interface to the current song

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/song:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

SongStates.name: SongStates
SongStates.description:
Interface to the states of the current song

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/songStates:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

State.name: State
State.description: An anonymous type representing a state

States.name: States
States.description: Base states functionality for State and racks

Transport.name: Transport
Transport.description:
Interface to the master transport

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/transport:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

PatternWatcher.name: PatternWatcher
PatternWatcher.description:
Represents a monitored pattern string.

Returned from the {{#crossLink "Variables/watch:method"}}{{/crossLink}} method.

Variables.name: Variables
Variables.description:
Provides access to Cantabile's internal variables by allowing a pattern string to be
expanded into a final display string.

Access this object via the {{#crossLink "Cantabile/variables:property"}}{{/crossLink}} property.

classitems.description: The names of the indicies used to reference this binding point
example:
This binding point requires two indicies... the rack index and the plug index

     "indicies": [ "Rack Index", "Plugin Index"],
classitems.name: indicies

classitems.description:
The binding point kind - the type of data send/expected by this binding piont

* "midi"
* "command"
* "switch"
* "float"
* "gainLevel"
* "integer"
* "index"
* "pitchBend"
* "programNumber"
* "bankedProgramNumber"
* "variant"
* "object"
classitems.name: kind

classitems.description:
The binding point parameter kind - the kind of parameter expected by this binding point

* "none"
* "triggerNumber"
* "popup"
* "keystoke"
* "script"
classitems.name: parameterKind

classitems.description: The id of the binding point
classitems.name: id

classitems.description: The display name of the binding point
classitems.name: displayName

classitems.description:
The kind of value accepted/sent by this binding point

* "Command" - value is ignored, binding point is a simple "action"
* "Switch" - True/false value, <0.5 = false, >= 0.5 = true
* "Value" - A numeric value (floating point or integer)
* "Object" - An object value (typically double, string or byte array)
classitems.name: kind

classitems.description:
The kind of value accepted/sent by this binding point

* "Float" - a floating point value
* "Integer" - an integer value
* "Index" - an index displayed either 0 or 1 based
* "ProgramNumber" - a program number displayed either 0 or 1 based
* "BankedProgramNumber" - a banked program number displayed in one of several banked program number formats
* "GainLevel" - a gain level displayed by convertin from scalar value to decibels
* "PitchBend" - a pitch bend value from 0 to 16384 but displayed as -8192 to 8191

This property is only present if 'kind' is "Value"
classitems.name: valueFormat

classitems.description:
The minimum value range

This property is only present if 'kind' is "Value"
classitems.name: valueMin

classitems.description:
The maximum value range

This property is only present if 'kind' is "Value"
classitems.name: valueMax

classitems.description: Information about the bindable object parameters supported by this binding point

classitems.description: Information about the binding point parameters supported by this binding point

classitems.description:
Retrieves a list of available binding points

If Cantabile is running on your local machine you can view this list
directly at <http://localhost:35007/api/bindings/availableBindingPoints>
classitems.name: availableBindingPoints

return.description: A promise to return an array of BindingPointInfo

classitems.description:
Invokes a target binding point

If Cantabile is running on your local machine a full list of available binding
points is [available here](http://localhost:35007/api/bindings/availableBindingPoints)
example:
Set the master output level gain

    C.bindings.invoke("global.masterLevels.outputGain", 0.5);

Sending MIDI Data directly

    C.bindings.invoke("midiInputPort.Main Keyboard", [ 0xb0, 23, 99 ]);

Sending MIDI Sysex Data directly

    C.bindings.invoke("midiInputPort.Main Keyboard", [ 0xF7, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0xF0 ]);

Some binding points expect a "parameter" value.  Parameter values are similar to the `value` parameter
in that they specify a value to invoke on the target of the binding.  The difference is related to the
way they're managed internally for user created bindings.  The `value` comes from the source of the binding 
whereas a `parameter` value is stored with the binding itself.

eg: Load the song with program number 12

    C.bindings.invoke("global.setList.loadSpecificSongByProgramInstant", null, null, 12);

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the binding point to invoke

params.name: value
params.description: The value to pass to the binding point

params.name: indicies
params.description: The integer indicies of the target binding point

params.name: parameter
params.description: The parameter value to invoke the target with

classitems.name: invoke

return.description: A promise that resolves once the target binding point has been invoked

classitems.description:
Queries a source binding point for it's current value.

If Cantabile is running on your local machine a full list of available binding
points is [available here](http://localhost:35007/api/bindings/availableBindingPoints)
example: console.log("Current Output Gain:", await C.bindings.query("global.masterLevels.outputGain"));
classitems.name: query

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the binding point to query

params.name: indicies
params.description: The integer indicies of the binding point

return.description: The current value of the binding source

classitems.description:
Starts watching a source binding point for changes (or invocations)

If Cantabile is running on your local machine a full list of available binding
points is [available here](http://localhost:35007/api/bindings/availableBindingPoints)
classitems.name: watch

params.name: name
params.description: The name of the binding point to query

params.name: indicies
params.description: The integer indicies of the binding point

params.name: condition
params.description: The condition for triggering the binding

params.name: callback
params.description:
Optional callback function to be called when the source binding triggers

The callback function has the form function(resolved, source) where resolved is the resolved display string and source
is the BindingWatcher instance.

classitems.description:
Invokes a target binding point

If Cantabile is running on your local machine a full list of available binding
points is [available here](http://localhost:35007/api/bindings/availableBindingPoints)
example:
Set the master output level gain

    C.bindings4.invoke("masterLevels", "outputGain", 0.5);

Sending MIDI Data directly

    C.bindings4.invoke("midiPorts", "out.Main Keyboard", [ 0xb0, 23, 99 ]);

Sending MIDI Sysex Data directly

    C.bindings4.invoke("midiPorts", "out.Main Keyboard", [ 0xF7, 0x00, 0x00, 0x00, 0xF0 ]);

classitems.description:
Opens this end point and starts listening for events. 

This method no longer needs to be explicitly called as end points are now
automatically opened when the first event listener is attached.

Use this method to keep the end point open even when no event listeners are attached.
classitems.name: open

classitems.description:
Closes the end point and stops listening for events.

This method no longer needs to be explicitly called as end points are now
automatically closed when the last event listener is removed.
classitems.name: close

classitems.description: Returns a promise that will be resolved when this end point is opened
classitems.name: untilOpen

classitems.description:
Returns a promise to provide the started state of Cantabile's audio engine.

This API is only available via  AJAX, and not WebSocket

This API is only available via  AJAX, and not WebSocket

classitems.description:
The kind of MIDI event

* Controller		
* FineController
* ControllerButton
* ControllerNonEdgeButton
* ControllerSwitch
* ProgramChange	
* BankedProgramChange
* PitchBend		
* ChannelPressure
* Note
* NoteOff
* NoteSwitch
* RpnCoarse
* RpnFine
* NRpnCoarse
* NRpnFine
* MasterVolume
* MasterBalance
* MmcStop
* MmcPlay
* MmcDeferredPlay
* MmcFastForward
* MmcRewind
* MmcRecordPunchIn
* MmcRecordPunchOut
* MmcRecordReady
* MmcPause
* MmcEject
* MmcChase
* MmcReset
* SongSelect
* ClockStart
* ClockContinue
* ClockStop
classitems.name: kind

classitems.description:
The associated controller number for any of the controller event kinds, or the program
number for program change event kinds.  

When used as a source binding condition, this property can be set to -1 for program change
events to be triggered on any program change.
classitems.name: controller

classitems.description:
Value 

The value property is only used when sending MIDI data and is ignored if specified when
setting a source binding condition.

classitems.description: Resolves a variable pattern string into a final display string
example:
let C = new CantabileApi();
    console.log(await C.variables.resolve("Song: $(SongTitle)"));

let C = new CantabileApi();
    C.variables.resolve("Song: $(SongTitle)").then(r => console.log(r)));
classitems.name: resolve

return.description: A promise to provide the resolved string

classitems.description: Starts watching a pattern string for changes
classitems.name: watch

params.name: pattern
params.description: The string pattern to watch

params.name: callback
params.description:
Optional callback function to be called when the resolved display string changes.

The callback function has the form function(resolved, source) where resolved is the resolved display string and source
is the PatternWatcher instance.

warnings.message: replacing incorrect tag: returns with return
